skills.name: Start MongoDB Shell
skills.desc: Start MongoDB Shell Learn how to start the MongoDB shell to interact with your databases and collections.

skills.name: Create Database and Collection
skills.desc: Create Database and Collection Understand how to create a new database and collection in MongoDB for storing documents.

skills.name: Insert Document
skills.desc: Insert Document Learn how to insert a single document into a MongoDB collection.

skills.name: Bulk Insert Documents
skills.desc: Bulk Insert Documents Understand how to insert multiple documents in bulk for better efficiency.

skills.name: Update Document
skills.desc: Update Document Learn how to update existing documents in a MongoDB collection.

skills.name: Bulk Update Documents
skills.desc: Bulk Update Documents Understand how to perform bulk updates on multiple documents at once.

skills.name: Delete Document
skills.desc: Delete Document Learn how to delete a specific document from a MongoDB collection.

skills.name: Bulk Delete Documents
skills.desc: Bulk Delete Documents Understand how to delete multiple documents in bulk.

skills.name: Find Documents
skills.desc: Find Documents Learn how to retrieve documents from a collection using basic query methods.

skills.name: Query with Conditions
skills.desc: Query with Conditions Understand how to use conditions to refine queries and fetch specific documents.

skills.name: Sort Documents
skills.desc: Sort Documents Learn how to sort query results based on specific fields in ascending or descending order.

skills.name: Project Fields
skills.desc: Project Fields Understand how to project specific fields to control the output of a query.

skills.name: Use Numeric Data Types
skills.desc: Use Numeric Data Types Learn how to use and store numeric data types in MongoDB documents.

skills.name: Use String Data Types
skills.desc: Use String Data Types Understand how to use and store string data types in MongoDB documents.

skills.name: Work with Array Data Types
skills.desc: Work with Array Data Types Learn how to use arrays as a data type to store lists of values within a document.

skills.name: Manage Array Elements
skills.desc: Manage Array Elements Understand how to add, update, or remove elements within an array in a MongoDB document.

skills.name: Design Order Schema
skills.desc: Design Order Schema Learn how to design a database schema for storing order-related data.

skills.name: Add Customer Information
skills.desc: Add Customer Information Understand how to add and manage customer information within a MongoDB schema.

skills.name: Create Embedded Documents
skills.desc: Create Embedded Documents Learn how to create embedded documents to structure nested data.

skills.name: Query Embedded Documents
skills.desc: Query Embedded Documents Understand how to query data that is stored within embedded documents.

skills.name: Create Index
skills.desc: Create Index Learn how to create an index to improve the performance of queries.

skills.name: Build Compound Index
skills.desc: Build Compound Index Understand how to create compound indexes to optimize multi-field queries.

skills.name: Handle Connection Errors
skills.desc: Handle Connection Errors Learn how to handle errors that occur when connecting to a MongoDB server.

skills.name: Handle Write Errors
skills.desc: Handle Write Errors Understand how to manage write errors during insert, update, or delete operations.

skills.name: Group Documents
skills.desc: Group Documents Learn how to group documents using the aggregation framework.

skills.name: Aggregate Group Totals
skills.desc: Aggregate Group Totals Understand how to calculate group totals using MongoDB's aggregation features.

skills.name: Import Data from JSON
skills.desc: Import Data from JSON Learn how to import data into MongoDB from JSON files.

skills.name: Import Data from CSV
skills.desc: Import Data from CSV Understand how to import data from CSV files into a MongoDB collection.

skills.name: Create Document References
skills.desc: Create Document References Learn how to create references between documents to establish relationships.

skills.name: Link Related Documents
skills.desc: Link Related Documents Understand how to link and manage relationships between related documents.
